title: Verify Spine v2 migration is terminal
reason: Read-only verification of all 16 migration-matrix flows vs code; suite GREEN (1804 passed). Verdict NOT-TERMINAL (narrow): safety-critical flows are event_truth with parity, but the order-status/spawn state machine (Atomic submit claim) stays legacy_truth by documented deferral. Distilled to pkl/process/migration-history.md; follow-up WO needed to event-source order-status/spawn.

title: Engine layer ADR audit
reason: Read-only engine audit vs ADR-001/002/003 + spine INV-1..9: all CONFIRMED with file:line; engine subset 157 GREEN. Findings: clock CONFIRMED-intent/DRIFT-wording (utcnow seam + injected now), 2 candidate ADRs (clock-seam pattern, two-driver TradingState), stale-doc notes; feeds WO-0006, awaits independent review.

title: Adapter + Store layer ADR audit
reason: Read-only adapter/store audit vs ADR-001/002/004: all CONFIRMED with file:line (alpaca isolated to broker/marketdata; client_order_id=order.id stable idempotency key; append-only event log with UNIQUE dedupe_key; dual-store parity verifiers). Store subset 37/39 GREEN. Candidate ADRs: none. Only carried-over caveat: order-status still legacy_truth (WO-0007). Feeds WO-0006, awaits independent review.

title: Facade + API layer ADR audit
reason: Read-only facade/api audit vs ADR-005: all clauses CONFIRMED with file:line (Contract-5 ratchet empty = every route behind the typed facade; facade_error_to_http domain-error mapping; actor:str on all command methods; no store/engine leakage). Facade/api subset 72/72 GREEN. Candidate ADRs: none. Finding: .importlinter Contract-5 header comment is stale (punch-list now empty). Feeds WO-0006, awaits independent review.

title: UI (Streamlit cockpit) ADR audit
reason: Read-only UI audit vs ADR-005 + invariants 4-7: all CONFIRMED with file:line (cockpit imports no app.*, grimp proof green; no alpaca; requests-only HTTP client; owns no engine state). UI subset 32/32 GREEN. Candidate ADRs: none; no stale docs. Feeds WO-0006, awaits independent review.

title: Add a mypy static-typecheck gate (baseline-and-ratchet)
reason: ADR-007 accepted; wired mypy over app/ (pyproject [tool.mypy] 16-module grandfather ratchet, requirements, ci.yml step, CLAUDE.md/testing-model deferred->wired). Also excluded vendored .ai-os/.claude from ruff (fixed PR-3 CI red). Verified: ruff check . PASS, mypy app/ Success, full suite 1804 passed.

title: Emit routine order-status ExecutionEvents + dual-store parity (no read-flip)
reason: Split-A of WO-0007. Every routine order-status transition now co-writes a deterministic order-status ExecutionEvent into execution_events in BOTH stores, atomically with the orders.status + audit write; orders.status stays authoritative (no read-flip, no projector). Sites: claim (SUBMIT_PENDING, occurrence-keyed), transition_order (SUBMITTED/PARTIALLY_FILLED/FILLED/CANCELED/REJECTED + fill-progress self-loop), and the two direct-CANCELED bypass writers plan_close_session + plan_flatten_position (scope correction from adversarial design review). New pure helper execution_event_for_routine_transition; planners untouched; TIMEOUT_QUARANTINE defense-in-depth guard on shared-format keys. Provenance deliberately ENGINE/LOCAL (safe under-claim; faithful broker provenance deferred to WO-0007b). Verified: ruff PASS, mypy app/ Success, full suite 1858 passed / 5 skipped / 0 failed (1863 collected; +6 quarantine-consumer regression). Adversarial verify (5 skeptics) INV-9 / dedupe / dual-store parity / scope-test-integrity / provenance all HOLDS. Flagged residual (out of scope): timeout_quarantined_order_ids docstring rationale now stale (output unchanged). Next: WO-0007b (projector + read-flip + broker provenance); awaits independent review before beta reliance.

title: Cleanup residuals — projectors docstring + .ai-os scope-checker comment parsing
reason: Two human-authorized residual fixes from the WO-0007a review. (1) Corrected the stale timeout_quarantined_order_ids docstring in app/events/projectors.py (routine path now also emits SUBMITTED/FILLED/CANCELED since WO-0007a; output unchanged, explained why the latest-wins fold stays correct). (2) Fixed .ai-os/scripts/check_work_order_scope.py::extract_list to strip inline # comments so a commented allowed_paths catch-all parses to the glob (was a false SCOPE CHECK FAILED for any WO using `- "**"  # comment`); new regression test tests/test_ai_os_scope_checker.py (RED->GREEN). Verified: 5 new tests pass, WO-0007a scope check now PASSED, ruff + mypy clean, full suite 1863 passed / 5 skipped / 0 failed (1868 collected).

title: Faithful per-transition provenance for routine order-status ExecutionEvents
reason: Follow-up to WO-0007a (human authorized faithful provenance). Routine order-status ExecutionEvents now carry faithful source/authority derived in-store by _routine_event_provenance(order,new): claim + CANCELED-with-no-broker_order_id => ENGINE/LOCAL; SUBMITTED/PARTIALLY_FILLED/FILLED/REJECTED + broker-confirmed CANCELED => BROKER_REST/BROKER_AUTHORITATIVE. Option B (in-store derivation, no monitoring/facade churn); pure planners untouched; INV-9 intact; not the read-flip (WO-0007b). Adversarial-verify pass (wf_e548dec7-f63, 2 of 3 skeptics) found a real over-claim in the initial old_status==CREATED proxy (the SUBMITTING->CANCELED submit-failure release is engine-local but has old status SUBMITTING); fixed at root cause by discriminating on broker_order_id is None (commit 9c1c30a) + 2 regression tests. Proposed ADR-008 documents the decision (WO-0006). Verified: ruff clean, mypy app/ Success, full suite 1890 passed / 5 skipped / 0 failed (1895 collected). Independent cross-model review batched with ADR-008 (event-log-adjacent).

title: ADR synthesis + project-state report
reason: Synthesized the audit wave (WO-0001..0005 + 0008 + 0007a) via a read-only 8-agent fan-out into project-state-report.md. Verdicts: engine/adapter-store/facade-api/UI all CONFIRMED (zero real code-vs-ADR drift; the lone WO-0002 'drift' is clock-WORDING, intent confirmed); migration NOT-TERMINAL (narrow) on the order-status flow, remediated by WO-0007a (eventing) + WO-0009 (provenance), with WO-0007b (projector+read-flip) the remaining gated step. Drafted proposed ADR-008 (order-status event provenance; NOT accepted). Corrected PKL: architecture-map.md stale '(now-terminal)' claim + migration-history.md change-log (testing-model.md already current post-WO-0008). Drafted code-fix orders to queue: WO-0011 (stale doc/comment refresh + shadow-fills NEEDS-INPUT) and WO-0012 (mypy grandfather burn-down). Human-decision batch (report S7): WO-0007b sign-off+independent review, ADR acceptances, WO-0012 scheduling, command-auth beta posture, CANCEL_PENDING/filled_quantity residuals. Suite baseline 1890 passed/5 skipped (1895 collected); ruff/mypy/import-linter green. Zero ADRs accepted without human approval.

title: Refresh stale migration-era doc comments
reason: Doc/comment-only refresh of superseded pre-flip/pre-WO-0007a wording (flagged by WO-0001/0002/0003/0007a, consolidated by WO-0006). Corrected: app/store/core.py FillPlan.execution_event comment (fills are event_truth; fill table is a parity-checked read model), app/models.py ExecutionEventType docstring (emission caught up via wave-3c/3d/3e + WO-0007a/0009; only WO-0007b projector/flip open), .importlinter header + Contract-5 comments (punch-list EMPTY, boundary fully enforced; comment-only), docs/MIGRATION_MATRIX.md (HISTORICAL banner -> live sources + fixed cockpit and import-linter enforcement cells), and tests/test_spine_phase3_shadow_fills.py docstring. Resolved the shadow-fills NEEDS-INPUT: its 2 skips are the intentional (store,helper) parametrize cross-product (each store has only its own append helper), NOT dead/removed-API skips; both prior claims were wrong. No logic/contract/behavior change. Verified: ruff clean, mypy Success, import-linter 5 kept/0 broken, full suite 1890 passed/5 skipped/0 failed (1895 collected).

title: Order-status projector + read-flip to event_truth
reason: The read-flip is DONE (human sign-off given). Recon found the WO unsound as titled (WO-0007a left the SUBMITTING->CREATED release + CANCEL_PENDING entry un-evented). Stage A evented both (SUBMIT_RELEASED occurrence-keyed + CANCEL_PENDING one-shot, ENGINE/LOCAL, both stores). Stage B built project_order_status (latest-lifecycle-event-wins fold). Stage C1 proved the projection reconstructs the live column across every lifecycle incl. released->CREATED + live CANCEL_PENDING. Stage D flipped get_order/list_orders (both stores + all order-returning paths) to derive STATUS from the event log (column demoted to co-written read-model; hand-corrupted column proven not to surface), added an init backfill reconstructing pre-eventing orders, and flipped MIGRATION_MATRIX 'Atomic submit claim' -> event_truth (the last legacy_truth flow; migration substantially terminal). Guard added: routine transition_order refuses TIMEOUT_QUARANTINE (evented-only). 3 adversarial-verify passes (wf_bb06bf7b-99f, wf_08c2fb09-b99, + the A-C1 pass) all HOLD. Verified: ruff clean, mypy app/ Success, full suite 1943 passed / 5 skipped / 0 failed (1948 collected). CAVEATS: STATUS only (filled_quantity event-sourcing deferred — not universally the FILL sum); PRE-BETA-RELIANCE gates HUMAN-only and NOT done here: ADR-008 formal acceptance (left Proposed) + independent cross-model review. Optional follow-up: replay.py ReadModelProjection order-status extension.

title: Complete the event-truth flip on the order-status write path + backfill (REV-0001 P0s)
reason: Remediates REV-0001 (Codex BLOCK). F-001 (P0): claim_order_for_submission now derives status from project_order_status under the lock in both stores, not the raw orders.status column, so a drifted column can't re-claim a log-SUBMITTED order. Sibling raw-column readers (transition_order/flatten/reconcile/close/exposure) documented safe under the co-write invariant (every status write co-appends a lifecycle event, verified writer-by-writer + independently re-verified), not rewritten; a defense-in-depth assert pins the invariant at the claim site (fail-loud, never blind-resubmit). F-002 (P0): backfill keys on status-lifecycle-event ABSENCE via projectors.ORDER_STATUS_EVENT_TYPES (FILL excluded) instead of projected==CREATED, fixing the released-cycle clobber while still reconstructing pre-eventing FILLED orders; proven new-fires subset of old. F-003: ADR-008 amended (SUBMIT_RELEASED/CANCEL_PENDING, ENGINE/LOCAL, ADR-001 note; stays Proposed). 12 dual-store RED->GREEN (tests/test_wo0013_event_truth_writepath.py). Verified: full suite 1983 passed/5 skipped/0 failed, ruff clean, mypy Success, import-linter 5/0. Adversarial re-verify wf_eb46fdce-662 (VER-13a/13b/X) all PASS. GATE NOT cleared: event-truth re-touch -> re-review packet REV-0003; ADR-008 still needs human acceptance.

title: Fix fractional trade-size truncation in the alpaca market-data stream (REV-0002 F-003)
reason: Remediates REV-0002 F-003 (a bug the WO-0012 type-cleanup introduced): int((existing.volume or 0)+trade.size) truncated fractional trade.size before the min-volume gate. Human decision D-1 = preserve fractional: volume is now float end-to-end (MarketSnapshot, MarketSnapshotView, fake, seed annotations); int() removed. RED->GREEN: fractional accumulation preserved (100+0.5+0.25=100.75) and a fractional volume round-trips through the API view (previously a Pydantic int_from_float error). No remaining int()/round() of volume/trade.size; no consumer needs int; volume never persisted (no schema migration). Not a human-gated surface (market-data working data). Verified: 265 marketdata/strategy/facade tests + full suite green, mypy clean. Adversarial re-verify VER-14 PASS.

title: Make a deferred manual-flatten operator-visible + thread the command actor (REV-0002 F-001/F-002)
reason: Remediates REV-0002 F-001/F-002 (Codex ACCEPT-WITH-CHANGES). Human decision D-2 = explicit response field. F-001: FlattenResult.deferred / FlattenResponse.deferred + deferred_order_status, keyed on plan.deferral_event is not None (NOT the FLATTEN_EXISTING outcome, so an idempotent own-flatten even at live SUBMITTED status stays deferred=False); cockpit renders a distinct 'no manual order submitted -- already exiting; monitoring' toast. F-002: command actor threaded route->facade->flatten_position->plan_flatten_position (manual_flatten_deferred payload) and ->_insert_sell_intent_* (created manual-flatten's sell_intent_created payload), both stores, default 'system'; protection-tick create stays 'system'. INVARIANTS INV-034/036 follow-ups Resolved. Purely additive (INV-9): flatten decision + no-blind-cancel branch + state byte-identical vs HEAD~1. Dual-store+facade+cockpit RED->GREEN over SUBMITTED/CANCEL_PENDING/TIMEOUT_QUARANTINE; no test weakened. Verified: full suite green, ruff/mypy/import-linter clean. Adversarial re-verify VER-15a/15b PASS. GATE NOT cleared: manual-flatten is human-gated -> re-review packet REV-0003.

title: Re-review of the REV-0001/REV-0002 remediation (event-truth write-path + manual-flatten)
reason: Independent re-review (Codex) of the WO-0013/0014/0015 remediation. Verdict ACCEPT-WITH-CHANGES: WO-0013 (event-truth write path) and WO-0015 (manual-flatten deferral/actor) gates CLEARED -- Codex independently re-derived the claim-gate projection, the lifecycle-event-absence backfill, the orders.status writer audit (co-write invariant holds), and the additive deferred discriminator. One P1 (F-001): ADR-008 as amended overclaimed authority-weighted status projection; project_order_status is latest-lifecycle-event-wins by sequence + transition-graph and never reads source/authority (confirmed: authority is nowhere a resolution input in app/). Fixed doc-only (option a, human-confirmed): ADR-008 clarified to state authority is provenance/audit-only for this flow, with authority-aware resolution recorded as deferred future work; pinned by new authority-independent latest-wins tests in tests/test_wo0007b_stageb_projector.py. ADR-008 stays Proposed pending human acceptance. Reviewer's full-suite check was unverified due to a Python 3.14.5 SQLite ResourceWarning artifact in unrelated tests; suite green in the supported env here (1983 passed / 5 skipped / 0 failed, ruff/mypy/import-linter clean). See work/review/REV-0003/disposition.md.

title: Re-review of the Tier-1 gated remediation (F-001, ENG-001, UC-002, ADR-008/INV-075)
reason: Independent re-review (Codex) of the three gated Tier-1 fixes + the ADR-008/INV-075 wording. Verdict ACCEPT-WITH-CHANGES. Gates CLEARED: REV-0006-F-001 (sqlite flatten single-tx atomicity), UC-002 (cancel operator-actor propagation, both branches, system default), ADR-008/INV-075 wording (pure sequence fold; legality at plan_transition_order, no ORDER_TRANSITIONS-consultation claim) -- all independently re-derived. Gate NOT cleared: ENG-001. REV-0019-F-001 (P1) -- the create_sell_intent store gate closes only the pre-create race; _open_protective_exit then separately awaits transition_sell_intent(APPROVED)/create_order_for_sell_intent/append_event(PROTECTION_TRIGGERED) with no further HALTED check, so a kill in that post-create window leaves an ORDERED intent + CREATED sell order + PROTECTION_TRIGGERED event under HALTED in both stores (INV-060 audit-integrity + stranded-order; P1 not P0 -- claim gate still blocks venue submission). Independently reproduced dual-store on Python 3.12.3 (memory/sqlite: halted [('ordered',True)] ['created'] 1), matching Codex exactly. REV-0019-F-002 (P2, doc-only): stale flatten comment app/store/sqlite.py:1659-1678 + test docstring test_phase7_flatten_atomic.py:130-144 still describe the pre-F-001 multi-commit/crash-window model. Follow-up: ENG-001 needs an atomic exit-open (create->approve->order->audit) under the HALTED check + a post-create-kill dual-store regression; two shapes (A gate create_order_for_sell_intent / B single atomic store op) pending human decision on the kill-switch gated surface; F-002 batches as doc cleanup. See work/review/REV-0019/disposition.md.
